name: World Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: World Holdings Co., Ltd. engages in the human resources and education, information and telecommunications, and real estate businesses. It offers temporary staffing, business contracting, and personnel introduction services; and manufacturing, office, construction engineer, and sales staff dispatch services. It also provides geographic information system development, discipline education and training, administrative consignment, and clinical trial consignment services; hospitality outsourcing; and cameras and digital equipment, and precision instruments repair services. In addition, the company is also involved in the software outsourcing and development business; condominium sales and management, residential land sales, building management, real estate consulting and brokerage, real estate development, renovation, and leasing management businesses; construction and sale of single-family detached homes; and design, development, sales, and rental of prefabricated houses. Further, it provides telemarketing and corporate solutions; operates cellphone shops; offers Web production and creative services; and manages agricultural parks and personal computer schools. The company was formerly known as World Intec Co., Ltd. and changed its name to World Holdings Co., Ltd. in July 2014. World Holdings Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Fukuoka City, Japan.
